prompt: I'd like you to go over the session logic especially the one that figures out if a session has ended and see if we can do improvements there. Basically we need a better / more reliable way a session ended. The main issue here is a user doing splitted commits after the session and the need to keep shadow branches around to continue to be able to do association. Maybe there is a better way

  5| // to "framework dispatcher calls agent methods." Agents are passive data providers;
  6| // the dispatcher handles all orchestration: state transitions, strategy calls,
